name: Urban Lockdown
short_description: With stunning digitized graphics, beatdown the escaped prison inmates, thwarting their boss in an epic showdown!
detailed_description:
Experience heart-pounding, non-stop action in this thrilling side-scrolling beat 'em up game!
From the creator of the smash hit Bad Ass Babes comes an adrenaline-fueled adventure that will have you on the edge of your seat. The evil crime lord Sanchez has broken out of prison and unleashed chaos upon the city—it's up to YOU to restore order and bring peace back to the streets!

Features:

  • Epic 3-player local co-op 🤝 – Team up with friends for an unforgettable journey!

  • Classic arcade nostalgia 🎮 – Relive the golden age of beat 'em ups with digitized sprites and retro vibes.

  • Old-school beat 'em up action ⚔️ – Battle through waves of enemies using powerful combos and juggles.

  • Simple yet nuanced combat system 🥋 – Easy to pick up, hard to master!

  • Jaw-dropping special moves 💥 – Unleash devastating attacks and surprise your foes.

  • Weapons & environmental traps 🪓 – Equip deadly weapons and use your surroundings to your advantage.

  • First-person, on-rails shooting levels 🔫 – Experience intense shooting action as you blast through enemies.

  • Test your reflexes ⚡ – Face waves of enemies that will challenge your speed and precision.

  • Unlock bonus modes and challenges 🎯 – Keep the excitement going with new content to explore.

  • Dojo training mode 🥋 – Hone your skills and master game mechanics in this interactive training mode.

Prepare yourself for an unforgettable ride—join the fight and restore order to the streets today!
